phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trova la biglietteria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah lah bee-lyeh-teh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Outside, north side of the stadium.

responses.english: Outside, north side of the stadium.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è l'ingresso per la curva, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kwahl EH leen-GRES-so per lah KOOR-vah, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, bisogna prenotare i biglietti online, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, bee-SOH-nyah pre-no-TAH-reh ee bee-lyet-tee on-LINE, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si fanno i controlli di sicurezza, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOOzee DOHvay see FAHnno ee konTRAWlee dee seekooRETSa per faVOHray

likely_response.local: Ai cancelli, prima di entrare negli spalti.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHEE kahn-CHEHL-lee PREE-mah DEE ehnt-RAH-reh NEHJ-lee SPAHL-tee
likely_response.translation_en: At the gates, before entering the stands.

responses.english: At the gates, before entering the stands.
responses.phonetic: AHEE kahn-CHEHL-lee PREE-mah DEE ehnt-RAH-reh NEHJ-lee SPAHL-tee
responses.local: Ai cancelli, prima di entrare negli spalti.
